Name: Add Server to Azure Load Balancer
Description: Uses Service Principal to Add Server to Azure Load Balancer.

Parameters.Name: psbilbAzureAccount
Parameters.Label: Azure Account
Parameters.HelpText: Service Principal used to connect to Azure

Parameters.Name: psbilbAzureSubscription
Parameters.Label: Azure Subscription
Parameters.HelpText: Subscription Load Balancer belongs to. Eg. 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000

Parameters.Name: psbilbAzureResourceGroup
Parameters.Label: Azure Resource Group
Parameters.HelpText: Resource Group Load Balancer belongs to. Eg. ProductionAus

Parameters.Name: psbilbAzureMachineName
Parameters.Label: Azure Machine Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of Virtual Machine to add to Load Balancer. Eg Web01

Parameters.Name: psbilbAzureLoadBalancer
Parameters.Label: Azure Load Balancer
Parameters.HelpText: Name of Load Balancer. Eg. LoadBalacer01

Parameters.Name: psbilbAzureLoadBalancerBackEndPoolName
Parameters.Label: Azure Load Balancer Back End Pool Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of Backend Pool on Azure Load Balancer. Eg. WebServers
